_description: Encoder cross-reference scoring configuration. Edit weights, tier assignments, and compatibility matrices here. No code changes needed for weight/tier adjustments. Adding a NEW rule or scoring method type requires a developer to register it in matcher.py.
_weight_rules: tier2 field weights must sum to 1.0
tier3 field weights must sum to 1.0
To move a field between tiers: remove from one block, add to other, rebalance both to sum to 1.0
_tier1_note: Hard stops — candidate is excluded entirely (score=0) if any rule fails. Rules reference named implementations in matcher.py. Params are passed through to the rule function.

tier1_hard_stops.description: Solid vs hollow shaft are physically incompatible — no adapter possible.
Hollow bore must match within 10%. Only applies when shaft_type is hollow_blind or hollow_thru. Solid-shaft rows skip this rule.
TTL/OC (low) and HTL (high) are electrically incompatible — different signal levels. low↔low and universal↔anything are allowed.

_tier2_note: Near-hard physical parameters. High weight. Weights must sum to 1.0. connection_type_canonical elevated from T3 to T2 — connector mismatch requires hardware change and is a strong compatibility signal.

cpr_values.description: CPR coverage: list intersection recall (how much of source CPR set candidate covers). Programmable candidate gets range-coverage score.

ip_rating.description: Candidate IP must meet or exceed source. One level below = 0.5. Two or more below = 0.0.

connection_type_canonical.description: Connector type compatibility. Exact match=1.0. Similar form factor (M12↔M23)=0.5. Adapter possible but non-trivial=0.3. Default for unlisted pairs=0.1.

output_circuit_canonical.description: Output circuit compatibility via matrix. Push-Pull↔TTL RS422=0.4 (electrical risk). Cross to OC=0.1-0.2.

housing_diameter_mm.description: Housing diameter proximity. Tight tolerance=full score, loose tolerance=partial. Score degrades linearly beyond loose band.

shaft_bore_diameter_mm.description: Bore diameter proximity (hollow shaft only). Tighter tolerance than housing — mechanical fit is critical.

_tier3_note: Secondary parameters. Lower weight, null-redistributed if missing. Weights must sum to 1.0. operating_temp moved up from 0.10 to 0.15 to fill connection_type's vacated slot.

supply_voltage.description: Overlap of source and candidate supply voltage ranges. Uses supply_voltage_min_v + supply_voltage_max_v from both sides.

sensing_method.description: Sensing technology (optical/magnetic). Exact match=1.0. Mismatch=0.5 (different technology but functionally equivalent in most industrial contexts).

operating_temp_max_c.description: Candidate max operating temp must meet or exceed source. 5°C tolerance band before penalty. Ratio score below tolerance.

shock_resistance_ms2.description: Candidate shock rating must meet or exceed source. Ratio score if below.

shaft_load_radial_n.description: Candidate radial shaft load must meet or exceed source. Ratio score if below.

vibration_resistance_ms2.description: Candidate vibration rating must meet or exceed source. Ratio score if below.

connector_pins.description: Connector pin count proximity. Exact=1.0. Score degrades linearly with difference up to max_diff.

_scoring_params_note: Numeric parameters for scoring methods. Adjustable without touching code.
_compat_matrices_note: Compatibility lookup tables. Rows = source value, columns = candidate value. Missing pairs use default_score. Matrices are directional — source→candidate and candidate→source can differ.

output_circuit._note: Electrical output circuit compatibility. Sin/Cos is analog — never compatible with digital types.

connection_type._note: Connector type compatibility. M12↔M23 adapters exist and are common. Cable-to-connector requires assembly but is feasible. MS/MIL is more specialized.
